@'
## Summary
What changed and why?

## Linked issue
Closes #<issue-number>

## Type of change
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Validation
- [ ] Tests or checks pass
- [ ] Manual verification completed

## Evidence
Screenshots, logs, or notes for the reviewer.

## Reviewer notes
Anything that deserves special attention?
'@ | Out-File -FilePath .github/pull_request_template.md -Encoding utf8
